summary: The node record divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in IPv4-mapped address conversion and ENR parse error returns; no node record behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 184: M	crates/net/peers/src/node_record.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to IPv4-mapped conversion and missing IP/UDP/TCP port error returns.
No address normalization, ENR IP/UDP/TCP extraction, node ID derivation, or parse error content changed.
